items.title: Introduction to Probability (Blitzstein & Hwang)
items.author: Joseph K. Blitzstein, Jessica Hwang
items.note: Clear treatment of expectation, variance, linearity, and indicator methods with worked examples.

items.title: All of Statistics (Wasserman)
items.author: Larry Wasserman
items.note: Concise coverage of moments, sample mean and variance, and their role in inference and ML.

items.title: SciPy stats module documentation
items.author: SciPy Developers
items.note: `.mean()`, `.var()`, and `.stats(moments='mv')` on named distributions for E[X] and Var(X).
